mnemonics.title: T Systems Core: STEL
mnemonics.content: **S**tates (system configurations), **T**ransitions (state changes), **E**vents (triggers), **L**ogic (safety properties). These four define any T System.

mnemonics.title: Safety vs Liveness Properties
mnemonics.content: **S**afety = 'Bad things **N**ever happen'. **L**iveness = 'Good things **E**ventually happen'. SN-LE: Safety Never, Liveness Eventually.

mnemonics.title: State Machine in Python
mnemonics.content: **C**lass defines states, **D**ictionary maps transitions, **M**ethod handles events. Think CDM: Class, Dictionary, Method for Python state machines.

mnemonics.title: IoT Logical Design Layers: MSSM
mnemonics.content: **M**odularity (separate concerns), **S**calability (grow the system), **S**ecurity (encrypt data), **M**icroservices (service architecture). Design principles for robust IoT.

mnemonics.title: Event-Driven Architecture
mnemonics.content: **P**ublish events, **S**ubscribe to topics, **R**eact to changes. PSR pattern - the foundation of MQTT-based IoT systems.
